SOP Phase 3 lines 143-151 say to 'choose the closest accurate package status used by existing active predicate-routed packages' without naming one. Explicit instruction added: retain behavioural_impact:NONE for both homocysteine manifests. Rationale: the behavioural_impact field records assembler-layer changes only; predicate routing was live before this sprint; PSI promotion is content-layer. SIGNAL_RUNTIME_ACTIVATION must not be used for these two packages. Record rationale in sprint report

overall_verdict: HARDENED. All five front-matter fields confirmed valid. Advisory currency verified — no commits on scoped files since 2026-06-24. Signal IDs signal_iron_low and signal_iron_high confirmed against PSI. Allowlist constant _BLOOD_IRON_OXYGEN_LAUNCH_SIGNAL_IDS confirmed at domain_score_assembler.py:88. Homocysteine predicate confirmed active at domain_score_assembler.py:189 — no assembler change required. Two hardening additions applied: (1) behavioural_impact must remain NONE for both homocysteine manifests — do not use SIGNAL_RUNTIME_ACTIVATION; (2) homocysteine card compile_status and source_spec_provenance must be updated to compile_pipeline and explicit respectively. All five candidate-level STOP gates present. Sprint cleared for kernel start.
